name: Steepleaf
mission: Botany and phenology taught through plates, keys, and habitat — merging into ForageCast Learn, not a standalone app.
portfolioNote: Steepleaf becomes the botany and phenology track inside ForageCast and the shared species knowledge base — botanical plates without duplicating a second species browser.
learnToday: How to read a botanical plate: leaf arrangement, margin, venation, and habitat
Phenology observation without collecting rare plants — photograph, don't poach
Connecting understory plants to canopy trees on north vs south slopes
Why Latin names are precision tools, not trivia
comingSoon: Species plates in the shared knowledge base
Phenology prompts on the regional dashboard
Fieldry WOS records for plant phenology phases

preview.title: The herbarium page
preview.description: Every leaf has a story — but botany belongs in the flagship learning path, not a parallel app. This preview documents the direction; active development focuses on ForageCast and Fieldry.
